# Ortobahn

> Autonomous AI marketing company that runs itself

Ortobahn uses 20 specialized AI agents organized in 3 tiers to generate strategy, create social posts and long-form articles, and publish across 6 platforms — fully autonomous, no humans in the loop.

- Website: https://ortobahn.com
- App: https://app.ortobahn.com
- Pricing: $49/month, 14-day free trial
- Built by: Vaultscaler (https://vaultscaler.com)

## How It Works
20-agent autonomous pipeline in 3 tiers:

### Content Pipeline (6 agents)
1. Analytics Agent — analyzes past performance
2. CEO Agent — sets strategy and direction
3. Strategist Agent — creates content plans from trending topics
4. Creator Agent — writes platform-native social posts
5. ArticleWriter Agent — produces long-form articles
6. Publisher Agent — confidence-gates and publishes

### Operations Layer (7 agents)
7. CFO Agent — tracks costs and profitability
8. SRE Agent — monitors system health and performance
9. Ops Agent — manages onboarding, scheduling, connectivity
10. CTO Agent — handles engineering tasks and CI/CD
11. Security Agent — watches for threats and audits access
12. Legal Agent — reviews content for compliance risks
13. Support Agent — monitors client health and surfaces recommendations

### Intelligence Systems (8 systems)
14. Memory — persistent observations and patterns per agent per client
15. Learning Engine — extracts lessons from outcomes
16. A/B Testing — tests content variations and learns what resonates
17. Cadence Optimization — finds ideal posting frequency
18. Predictive Timing — publishes when audiences are most engaged
19. Style Evolution — refines brand voice based on performance
20. Reflection — periodic self-assessment comparing predictions to outcomes
21. Prompt Tuning — automatically optimizes agent prompts

## Publishing Platforms (6)
Bluesky, Twitter/X, LinkedIn (posts + articles), Medium, Substack

## Data Sources
Google Trends, NewsAPI, RSS feeds

## Notifications
Slack

## Get Started
Sign up: https://ortobahn.com/#request-access
API: POST https://app.ortobahn.com/api/onboard

https://ortobahn.com/llms-full.txt
